titleStmt.title: SII 9.281: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 281. (A.R. No. 99-A of 1904.) ON THE FIFTEENTH SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARI DISTRICT.

summary.p: In Ељaka 1111, KД«laka, BhДЃdrapada, ba. 6, Maб№…gaбё·avДЃra, VyatД«pДЃta corresponding to A.D. 1188 September 13 Tuesday, the MahДЃjanas of BДЃбё·guбё·i are stated to have made a grant of one mattar of wet land for the repairs of DДЃseya-NДЃyaka's tank.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
